original_prompt: Flat geometric illustration of a person at a kitchen table reviewing a household budget on a tablet, warm morning light, plants on the sill, coffee cup, headline space reserved in left third. Palette: sage #7A9B76, sand #E8DCC4, clay #B8654F, ink #1A1F2E. Avoid photoreal faces, brand logos, glassmorphism, neon gradients.
style_anchor: Flat geometric illustration. Bold deliberate shapes, generous negative space, no gradients. Slight grain texture. Sage/sand/clay palette.

edit_history.prompt_delta: Make the coffee cup a teal mug instead of white.
